news.headline: Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) will announce Q4 2024 financial results on Jan 22, 2025, with a conference call at 8:00 a.m. Eastern.
news.summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on the morning of January 22, 2025. A conference call to review these results and the company's future prospects will take place at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Time). Interested individuals can access the call via webcast on www.textron.com or through direct dialing at (800) 343-1703 in the U.S. or (785) 424-1226 internationally; using Access Code: 84015. Furthermore, a recording of the call will be available for playback.

news.headline: Bakersfield Renewable Fuels Facility produces 250,000 gallons of renewable diesel daily, marking a major step for Global Clean Energy Holdings.
news.summary: Global Clean Energy Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB:GCEH) based in Los Angeles disclosed that their Bakersfield Renewable Fuels Facility has commenced commercial operations. The facility, known for being a prominent camelina producer and renewable fuels innovator, is generating an estimated 250,000 gallons of renewable diesel per day. This development signifies a crucial achievement for the company as it embarks on supplying eco-friendly, economical, and low-carbon fuel to consumers. The Facility utilizes patented technology that is highly expandable.

Fed's Hammack: Dissented because data supported holding the Fed policy steady.
LandBridge buys 46,000 acres in the Delaware Basin, Texas, from VTX Energy; strengthens position in Reeves and Pecos Counties.
news.summary: In Houston, LandBridge Company LLC (NYSE: LB) has completed the acquisition of the Wolf Bone Ranch, comprising around 46,000 mostly adjacent surface acres in the Delaware Basin from a VTX Energy Partners, LLC subsidiary, a Vitol investment. This purchase enhances LandBridge's presence in Reeves and Pecos Counties, Texas, key areas in the oil industry.

news.summary: In the year 2025, AS Ekspress Grupp is set to release its consolidated financial results, along with quarterly updates on digital subscriptions as per the following timetable.

news.headline: Korea Zinc union seeks support in fight against MBK's takeover; meeting with FKMTU for solidarity.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, the Korea Zinc (KRX:010130) labor union sought support from the Federation of Korean Metalworkers' Trade Unions (FKMTU), a part of the Federation of Korean Trade Unions (FKTU), to combat MBK Partners' hostile acquisition. The meeting included Korea Zinc labor union chairman Moon Byung-guk, FKMTU chairman Kim Joon-young, and other crucial members aiming to strengthen their resistance against the takeover bid.

news.headline: Battalion Oil Corporation terminates merger agreement with Fury Resources, Inc. in Houston, Texas on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Houston, Texas on December 20, 2024, Battalion Oil Corporation (NYSE American: BATL) declared the cancellation of the Agreement and Plan of Merger with Fury Resources, Inc. This decision affects the previously amended Merger Agreement between the two companies.

news.headline: HWH International Inc. and Sharing Services Global Corporation collaborate in robotics with SHRG joining A3, attending A3 Business Forum.
news.summary: In Bethesda, MD on December 20, 2024, HWH International Inc. ("HWH") (Nasdaq: HWH) and Sharing Services Global Corporation ("SHRG") (OTC: SHRG) are expanding their joint efforts in robotics. Noteworthy is SHRG's membership in the Association for Advancing Automation (A3) and planned participation in the A3 Business Forum in Orlando, FL in January 2025.

news.headline: Renovaro partners with Nebul for early disease detection, aiming to revolutionize healthcare.
news.summary: Renovaro has announced a strategic partnership with Nebul to drive forward a revolutionary approach in early disease detection. The collaboration aims to leverage cutting-edge technology and expertise to transform the landscape of healthcare. This move comes at a critical time when there is an increasing emphasis on proactive health management. Both companies bring a wealth of knowledge and experience to the table, with Renovaro specializing in data analytics and Nebul known for its innovative solutions in the medical field. Together, they aspire to revolutionize early disease detection, potentially saving countless lives. This partnership marks a significant step towards a new era in healthcare, where prevention and early intervention take center stage.

news.headline: BioAtla, Inc. to offer 9,679,158 shares with warrants at $0.9520 to advance clinical programs for solid tumors.
news.summary: BioAtla, Inc. (Nasdaq: BCAB), a biotech company in San Diego, disclosed that it has struck a deal with institutional investors for the sale of 9,679,158 shares of common stock in a registered direct offering. Each share includes a warrant to buy another share at $1.19 each, exercisable in six months and expiring 5.5 years from issuance. The combined cost per share and warrant is $0.9520. The transaction is set to close on December 20, 2024, pending standard closing terms.

news.summary: Today in Miami Beach, Florida, on December 20, 2024, the Herzfeld Caribbean Basin Fund, Inc. (NASDAQ: CUBA) disclosed its plans to issue a cash distribution following the Fund's managed distribution policy.

news.headline: Channel Therapeutics discusses differences between NaV1.7 and NaV1.8 following Vertex Pharmaceutical's Phase 2 data on Suzetrigine for pain treatment.
news.summary: A statement was released by Channel Therapeutics Corporation, a leading developer of non-opioid pain treatments, in response to Vertex Pharmaceutical's Phase 2 data on Suzetrigine. Suzetrigine is an oral, highly selective NaV1.8 pain signal inhibitor being studied for painful lumbosacral radiculopathy. This information was shared on December 20, 2024, without revealing the exact details of the data or the implications for the market. Channel Therapeutics is listed on the NYSE American under the symbol CHRO.

news.summary: Recently, a new study revealed that the global population has reached 7.8 billion people. This marks a significant increase from previous years and highlights the ongoing growth of the world's population. The study also found that the average life expectancy worldwide has risen to 72 years. Additionally, it reported that the world's GDP has reached $87.5 trillion, showcasing the continued economic development happening across the globe. Overall, these findings illustrate the trends of population growth, longer life expectancies, and increased economic output on a global scale.

news.headline: Verint to host Investor Day on Jan 14, 2025. CX Automation, AI momentum discussed, initial FYE26 guidance. 2-hour event.

During this event, the focus will be on various significant aspects including the CX Automation market's development, Verint's progress in AI, reported AI business outcomes by customers, initial guidance for FYE26, and the company's long-term financial model. The event is structured to last for two hours with a dedicated Q&A session following the prepared remarks. This presents a key opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the company's strategies and future prospects.

news.headline: Savaria Corp declared 4.5 cents monthly dividend on Dec 20, 2024. Payable on Jan 10, 2025 to shareholders on record by Dec 31.
news.summary: Laval, Quebec, December 20, 2024 - Savaria Corporation, a prominent player in the accessibility sector, announced a dividend of 4.5 cents ($0.045) per common share. This dividend, aligned with their monthly dividend strategy, is set to be distributed on January 10, 2025, to shareholders on record as of December 31, 2024. The declared dividend is considered an eligible dividend per the Income Tax Act. Savaria Corporation, traded as SIS on the TSX, continues to demonstrate its commitment to providing returns to its shareholders through this dividend declaration.

Bitcoin's value has dropped to $30,000. Will establishing a crypto reserve under Trump spur a rally?

Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin drop significantly in market turmoil; Bitcoin falls below $100,000. Trump's DJT stock falls by 5%. Musk faces challenges with government ambitions. US stocks face correction amid volatility. Bitcoin liquidations top $1 billion. Musk's involvement in DOGE questioned.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a significant decline with Bitcoin dropping by 10%, Ethereum and XRP by 18%, and Dogecoin by 28%. This drastic change in value has raised concerns about the future outlook of Bitcoin, with some like Gordon Johnson likening it to "rat poison" and calling it "worthless" as it dips below $100,000. On another note, El Salvador continued to invest in Bitcoin despite IMF warnings, purchasing $1 million worth of BTC after suggestions to scale back. Additionally, Shytoshi Kusama announced a partnership between Shiba Inu and Chainlink to enhance the Shibarium ecosystem. Meanwhile, Craig Wright, who claimed to be the inventor of Bitcoin, received a prison sentence for not complying with a court order. The overall crypto market saw liquidations surpassing $1 billion, leading to Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin further retracting, with predictions of BTC potentially losing the $96k support. In the US markets, stocks faced potential correction due to volatility, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq ending in the red. Micron's sales miss added to investor sentiment decline, placing the greed index in an "extreme fear" zone. Traders prepared for a lower opening as they braced for the "Triple Witching" hour, but some analysts anticipated a year-end recovery despite the current situation. The article also highlighted five stocks drawing investor attention, including Nike, FedEx, Blackberry, Rigetti, and Tesla. Furthermore, the mention of Elon Musk’s role in Dogecoin was teased, with more details available on Benzinga.com.

The global Bluetooth speaker market is projected to achieve $36.06 billion by 2029, a significant increase from $20.98 billion in 2023, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.45% during the period of 2023 to 2029. The comprehensive report covers data on 60 vendors participating in the market. With a blend of established companies and newcomers, the Bluetooth speaker market is fiercely competitive.

(OTC: BDCC), a leading company in 3D house printing technology, has released a report highlighting its key accomplishments in 2024 and has announced its plans for 2025. news.headline: David Jeremiah and Turning Point Ministries aim to share the hope of Christmas through a film globally on December 20, 2024.
news.summary: David Jeremiah and Turning Point Ministries are spreading the message of Christmas hope in San Diego. Amidst the hustle and bustle of the holiday season, it is crucial to remember the true meaning behind the celebrations. As of December 20, 2024, they have been actively engaging in activities that remind people of the significance of this special time. This initiative aims to reach a wide audience and share the essence of Christmas with as many individuals as possible.

news.headline: Stablecoins transforming global payments: Panelist at Benzinga conference says transaction volume nearing double that of Visa, vital for cross-border transactions.
news.summary: During a panel discussion at the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets conference, stablecoins were highlighted as a key player in revolutionizing global payments. CEO of VanEck, Jan van Eck, emphasized stablecoins as a catalyst for a new financial paradigm, especially in regions with inefficient banking systems. Van Eck stated that stablecoins are reshaping the global payments landscape, serving as a foundational element for transactions across borders and enhancing financial inclusivity. In particular, he noted the swift adoption of stablecoins in emerging markets for activities like foreign exchange and remittances. The transaction volume of stablecoins in these markets is now nearing double that of Visa, underscoring their pivotal role in international trade. Despite their expanding usage globally, van Eck pointed out that stablecoins are not fully appreciated in the United States, where traditional banking systems still dominate.

news.headline: Dogecoin price plunges by 21% to 28 cents, alarms traders. Market cap at $42.2 billion. Pepe down 19.7%. Shiba Inu down 17.9%.
news.summary: The sharp decline of Dogecoin (DOGE) by 21% has sparked concern among traders and investors as the cryptocurrency struggles to uphold crucial support levels to prevent further losses. Dogecoin is currently priced at $0.2867 with a market cap of $42.2 billion, showing a 24-hour trend decrease of -21.2% and a 7-day decline of -29.3%. Similarly, Shiba Inu (SHIB) is priced at $0.00001987 with a market cap of $11.7 billion, experiencing a 24-hour decrease of -17.9% and a week-long drop of -29%. Pepe (PEPE) follows suit at $0.00001987 with a market cap of $6.5 billion, showing a 24-hour decrease of -19.7% and a 7-day decline of -34.5%. Notably, crypto trader Kevin correctly predicted Dogecoin's current price range of $0.26–$0.28 on Nov. 13, despite facing criticism. Kevin stands by his viewpoint, emphasizing the developing situation.

news.headline: Detroit Metro Airport to introduce Park Assist solution by TKH Security, aiming to streamline parking for millions of travelers.
news.summary: Enhancing Parking Experience at DTW Airport with TKH Security's Park Assist SolutionCheshire, Connecticut - On December 20, 2024, TKH Security introduced their Park Assist Solution at Detroit Metropolitan Wayne County Airport (DTW) to improve the parking experience for travelers. With the holiday season underway, a record number of passengers are opting for air travel, prompting airports nationwide to enhance their services. By implementing the Park Assist Solution, DTW aims to streamline the parking process and ensure smoother journeys for passengers. This innovation is expected to significantly reduce parking time and enhance overall customer satisfaction at the airport.

news.headline: Eos Energy seeks new factory location to meet growing demand for American-made energy storage solutions, focused on zinc-based technology in the US.
news.summary: Rising demand has prompted a company to enhance and expedite its manufacturing capacity for zinc-based energy storage in the United States. This decision comes as a response to the increasing need for such technology. The expansion will see a significant increase in production capabilities, with a focus on meeting the growing market requirements. This move reflects the company's commitment to catering to the rising demand for zinc-based energy storage solutions in the United States.

news.headline: Xue Mo's literary works enhance global light festival with stunning visuals, showcased in selected collection.

This unique showcase will feature a curated selection of Mo's works, merging art and illumination to offer a captivating visual experience. The integration of Mo's writing into the light show aims to bring a new level of depth to this sensory celebration.

(OTC PINK: MVCO), a leading holding company focusing on growth in digital and traditional sectors, has revealed a significant move by executing a 100-for-1 forward stock split of its common stock. This strategic decision illustrates the company's dedication to enhancing shareholder value over an extended period.

news.headline: Fed's inflation gauge falls, PCE index at 2.4% (Nov 2024), below forecasts; core PCE at 2.8%, incomes rise by 0.3% monthly.
news.summary: In November 2024, the Federal Reserve's key inflation measure, the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index, increased by 2.4% year-over-year, slightly below economist expectations of 2.5%. This was a slight uptick from October's 2.3% and marked the second consecutive monthly rise. On a monthly basis, the PCE index grew by 0.1%, a slowdown from the previous month's 0.2% increase. Excluding volatile elements like food and energy, the core PCE remained unchanged at 2.8% year-over-year, falling short of the anticipated 2.9%. Monthly core PCE growth also decelerated to 0.1% from the prior month's 0.3%, missing expectations of 0.2%. Additionally, personal income saw a 0.3% increase month-over-month in November. This data came as a relief to markets, especially after the Federal Reserve's recent warnings about rising price pressures approaching the new year.

news.headline: Fed's Williams: The baseline trajectory is for more rate cuts based on data.
CA RISE allocates second round of funding to 61 social enterprises in California to enhance job opportunities.
news.summary: In California, a total of 61 social enterprises focused on employment are set to increase job prospects for individuals overcoming barriers to employment. The California Regional Initiative for Social Enterprise (CA RISE), based in San Francisco, is leading this effort. news.headline: Global sustainable data center market expected to reach $85.44 billion by 2029, growing at CAGR of 13.71% from 2023 to 2029. Leading tech giants such as Google, Microsoft, Oracle, IBM, Tencent, Meta, and AWS are driving the industry.
news.summary: Dublin - A report titled "Sustainable Data Center Market - Global Outlook & Forecast 2024-2029" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global sustainable data center market is projected to see substantial growth, with investments reaching $85.44 billion by 2029, a significant increase from $39.51 billion recorded in 2023. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.71% from 2023 to 2029. Key industry players in the data center sector such as Vantage Data Centers, Kao Data, Khazna, Africa Data Centres, STT GDC, GDS, and Equinix are noted for their adoption of HVO fuel.
